// purpose: Shared TypeScript config for every fixture under fixtures/ts/**. Per-fixture tsconfig.json files extend this + add nothing else.
// why-ESNext-module: Fixtures use top-level `await` when calling generate / scorer.run etc. module: ESNext unlocks that.
// why-no-dom: Fixtures run inside brainkit's SES compartment — jsbridge polyfills provide Audio / WebSocket / FormData / fetch / etc. globals.d.ts declares all of them; including the default DOM lib would double-declare.
// why-skipLibCheck: Users who opt into `lib: ["dom"]` at their own config layer get duplicate-identifier warnings; skipLibCheck suppresses those. brainkit's own d.ts set is clean without DOM.
// why-no-baseUrl: TypeScript 7.0 removes baseUrl. Since TS 5.0, `paths` keys are resolved relative to the tsconfig file that declares them — no baseUrl needed. Values here resolve relative to `fixtures/` (the directory containing this file).
